name: storeroom
hints: A storeroom with a star and a warning sign about condemned stairs below.
GET STAR. The sign warns the stairway is condemned but you can still go DOWN. Be prepared for rabid rats.
Take the star. Going DOWN leads to the staircase (room 14) with rabid rats. NORTH returns to the plain room.
notes: Storeroom with a *STAR* and a sign warning of condemned stairs. Down leads to the staircase (room 14) with rabid rats. North returns to the plain room (room 10). Accessed by PUSH SOUTH from room 10.
